; reTasker: show a brief "Added to todos" confirmation after a capture.
;
; Capturing a todo is otherwise silent. The selection menu closes immediately and
; the native captureHandler writes the PNG, so there is no in-context feedback. The
; native side emits "retasker.captured" over the broker's 'u' route once the write
; succeeds; this listener, parented to MainView (the always-instantiated top-level,
; alive on the home screen and inside a notebook alike), flashes a static overlay.
;
; E-ink: pure black/white, instant visible toggle (no opacity/animation), matching
; the rest of reTasker. The Timer hides it after a short dwell.
;
; Plaintext identifiers resolve via the qt-resource-rebuilder hashtab, same as
; retasker-newnote.qmd which patches this file too.

AFFECT /qml/device/view/main/MainView.qml
    IMPORT net.asivery.XoviMessageBroker 2.0

    TRAVERSE ?#root
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            Rectangle {
                id: retaskerToast
                objectName: "retasker-toast"
                z: 10000
                visible: false
                color: "black"
                radius: 8
                width: retaskerToastLabel.implicitWidth + 56
                height: retaskerToastLabel.implicitHeight + 32
                anchors.horizontalCenter: parent.horizontalCenter
                anchors.top: parent.top
                anchors.topMargin: 48

                Text {
                    id: retaskerToastLabel
                    anchors.centerIn: parent
                    text: "Added to todos"
                    color: "white"
                    font.pixelSize: 34
                }

                Timer {
                    id: retaskerToastTimer
                    interval: 1800
                    onTriggered: retaskerToast.visible = false
                }

                XoviMessageBroker {
                    id: retaskerToastBroker
                    listeningFor: ["retasker.captured"]
                    function onSignalReceived(sgn, message) {
                        retaskerToast.visible = true;
                        retaskerToastTimer.restart();
                        return "";
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
